## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and plan the path for an experimentation study on AI-driven content optimization and citations.](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Agreed to focus on creating a comprehensive study using synthetic data to analyze tactics for improving LLM search visibility and citations](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [Identified need to research existing SEO studies and tactics as a foundation for the LLM-focused experiment](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)
  - [Decided to create a design document outlining the experiment structure, including a list of potential tactics/features to test](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

## Topics

### Synthetic Data Generation Approach

  - [Proposed using LLMs to generate diverse search queries for companies (e.g., Ramp) and competitors](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Synthetic data will simulate real user searches and LLM responses, as actual data is inaccessible](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [This approach allows for large-scale data generation and controlled experimentation](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)

### Study Objectives and Methodology

  - [Primary goal: Identify tactics most effective for improving visibility in LLM search results](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Plan to use statistical methods (e.g., linear regression) to analyze correlations between tactics and mentions](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Will leverage LLMs for data labeling to assess qualitative factors like content quality and authoritativeness](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)

### Parallels with SEO Research

  - [Recognized similarities between proposed study and historical SEO optimization efforts](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Discussed challenges in quantifying qualitative factors like "helpfulness" and "authoritativeness"](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Agreed to research existing SEO studies for insights and to avoid duplicating work](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)

### Content Quality Assessment

  - [Identified need to develop a scoring system for content quality](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [Discussed potential features: uniqueness, expert opinions, new information, overall helpfulness](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)
  - [Agreed to brainstorm with the team to define and quantify quality metrics](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)

### Publication and Marketing Potential

  - [Explored possibility of publishing results as a formal paper, similar to prompt engineering studies](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
  - [Discussed using the study as a marketing tool to demonstrate GrowthX's expertise](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [Considered creating a comprehensive guide/documentation site for AI awareness optimization](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to initiate a list of potential tactics/features for the study](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
  - [Katja to create a design document outlining the experiment structure](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Team to research existing SEO studies and tactics relevant to LLM optimization](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
  - [Schedule regular follow-up meetings to track progress and discuss findings](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Explore potential for publishing results as a formal paper or comprehensive guide](https://fathom.video/share/pMrrgh3bhwV-s4xqaexctfQe4yuXxzMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
